columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: Ingestion timestamp, set to the time the record was received by the data collection endpoint.

columns.name: IncidentId
columns.description: Unique identifier of the incident (e.g. INC-001).

columns.name: Severity
columns.description: Incident severity: Critical, High, Medium, or Low.

columns.name: Status
columns.description: Current status of the incident: Active, Investigating, Resolved, or Closed.

columns.name: AffectedUser
columns.description: UPN of the user associated with the incident.

columns.name: SourceIp
columns.description: Source IP address associated with the incident.
